headline: How The Colgate Palmolive (CL) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And 2030 Plan
summary: Colgate-Palmolive’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$97.26 to US$96.68 per share, a change of about US$0.58 that keeps the overall valuation view broadly intact while acknowledging updated inputs. That small adjustment sits against mixed Street commentary, where some analysts highlight the long term 2030 plan and others flag cost and valuation risks that have led to price targets moving both higher and lower. Read on to see how these shifting targets, recent news, and new...

headline: Bitcoin hits $73,000 on Middle East geopolitical relief and $350M ETF inflow
summary: Investing.com -- Bitcoin (BitfinexUSD) pushed toward the $73,000 level early Saturday, buoyed by a significant return of institutional appetite and a sharp "risk-on" shift in global markets.

raw.headline: Bitcoin hits $73,000 on Middle East geopolitical relief and $350M ETF inflow

headline: Foreign investors dump Indian equities at record pace on energy shock
summary: Investing.com -- Foreign investors are retreating from Indian stocks at the fastest rate on record, as the protracted energy crisis stemming from the U.S.-Iran conflict threatens to derail the world’s fastest-growing major economy.

raw.headline: Foreign investors dump Indian equities at record pace on energy shock
